project_identity.name: Machine Failure RCA Platform
project_identity.archetype: ARCHETYPE 2: THE PERFORMANCE PRO (Adapted for Reliability Engineering)
design_principles: Fusion: Industrial HMI x Swiss Poster Design
Density: Every pixel utilized, no wasted space
Contrast: High contrast for critical alerts

rules: Use 'Barlow Condensed' for all major headings and module titles.
Use 'JetBrains Mono' for ALL data values, timestamps, and code snippets.
Use 'Manrope' for body text, tooltips, and navigation.
Labels must be uppercase and widely tracked.

usage_rules: Backgrounds: Use Zinc-950 (#09090b) as the main canvas. Avoid pure black.
Cards: Use Zinc-900 (#18181b) with a 1px Zinc-800 border.
Interactive: Hover states should brighten the background (Zinc-800) or add a colored border glow.
Data Visualization: Use the 'accent' palette for charts. Ensure colorblind accessibility.
Text: Never use pure white (#ffffff) for body text; use Zinc-100 (#f4f4f5). Use pure white only for active headers.

dashboard_rules: Every widget must have a 1px border. No rounded corners > 4px.
Maximize vertical space. Use 'h-full' to stretch widgets.

surfaces: Grid Borders: Use 'border-r border-b border-border/40' for data tables.
Tracing Beam: Use animated gradient borders for active analysis panels.
Glassmorphism: Use ONLY for floating tooltips or modal overlays (backdrop-blur-md bg-black/60). NEVER for main data cards.
decorations: Scanlines: Optional overlay opacity-5 for 'Retro-Futurism' mode in terminal views.
Corner Accents: Add 2px solid accents at the corners of critical alert boxes.

buttons.primary: bg-primary text-primary-foreground hover:bg-primary/90 rounded-sm font-medium tracking-wide uppercase text-sm h-10 px-6
buttons.secondary: bg-secondary text-secondary-foreground hover:bg-secondary/90 rounded-sm font-medium h-10 px-4
buttons.outline: border border-input bg-background hover:bg-accent hover:text-accent-foreground rounded-sm

cards.default: rounded-sm border border-border bg-card text-card-foreground shadow-sm
cards.interactive: group relative overflow-hidden rounded-sm border border-border bg-card transition-colors hover:border-primary/50

inputs.default: flex h-10 w-full rounded-sm border border-input bg-background px-3 py-2 text-sm ring-offset-background file:border-0 file:bg-transparent file:text-sm file:font-medium placeholder:text-muted-foreground focus-visible:outline-none focus-visible:ring-2 focus-visible:ring-ring focus-visible:ring-offset-2 disabled:cursor-not-allowed disabled:opacity-50

tables.header: bg-muted/50 font-mono text-xs uppercase tracking-wider text-muted-foreground

media.icons: Lucide React (default), Phosphor Icons (for dashboard density)

chart_library.complex_causal: React Flow (for node graphs) or Visx

preferences.tooltip: bg-background border border-border shadow-xl rounded-sm p-2 text-xs font-mono

instructions_to_main_agent: 1. IMPLEMENTATION: Start by setting up the Tailwind theme with the specified colors and fonts.
2. COMPONENTS: Customize Shadcn components to remove excessive rounding (set radius to 0.125rem or 0.25rem).
3. LAYOUT: Use the 'Bento' grid system for the dashboard. Avoid whitespace in the main data view.
4. CHARTS: Use Recharts for all time-series and anomaly charts. Customize the tooltips to be 'technical' (mono font, strict borders).
5. REPORT: The RCA Report Generator should output a clean, print-friendly layout (white background option).
6. TESTING: Add 'data-testid' to all interactive elements.
